FA. 273(3), ATEIE 24 SHaT, 2013 Y A, AT, 288(3), ARG 29 ST, 2014 FTT Forfard fm | 2964 GI/2014 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FORESTS AND CLIMATE CHANGE ORDER New Delhi, the 22nd July, 2014 S.0. 1880(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of Section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendment in the Order of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.0. 93(E), dated 29th January, 1998, namely:— In the said order, in the opening, paragraph, for the words "for a period of sixteen years and six months", the words "for a period of sixteen years and nine months" shall be substituted. [F. No. Q-18011/13/2000-CPA (Pt.)] Dr. RASHID HASAN, Advisor Note :—The Principal order was published in the Gazette of India vide No. S.O. 93(E), dated the 29th January, 1998 and subsequently amended vide No. S.O. 68(E), dated the 25th January, 2000, No. S.O. 108(E), dated the 25th January, 2002, No. S.0. 99(E), dated the 28th January, 2003, No. S.0. 396(E), dated the 3rd April, 2003, No. S.O. 94(E), dated the 25th January, 2006, No. S.0. 1207(E), dated the 27th July, 2006, No. S.O. 679(E), dated the 27th April, 2007, No. S.0. 1219(E), dated the 26th July, 2007, No. S.O. 1720(E), dated the 18th July, 2008, No. S.0. 1839(E), dated the 27th July, 2009, No. S.O. 190(E), dated the 25th January, 2010, No. S.0. 105(E), dated the 19th January, 2011, No. S.O. 178(E), dated the 28th January, 2012, No. S.0.273(E), dated the 24th January, 2013 and No. S.O. 288(E), dated the 29th January, 2014.
